selected: C1 (C, 2.12 A, Cp* ring -- rigid steric body)
C9 (C, 2.13 A, Cp* ring -- rigid steric body)
C7 (C, 2.14 A, Cp* ring -- rigid steric body)
C5 (C, 2.20 A, Cp* ring -- rigid steric body)
C3 (C, 2.22 A, Cp* ring -- rigid steric body)
synthesized: H1 (H, hydride at 1.6 A along IR->CL; inferred (Cl->H; not crystallographic))
dropped: CL (CL, 2.42 A, labile leg -> replaced by hydride)

anchor.description: cofactor primary aryl-sulfonamide N2 binds native CA-II catalytic Zn (held by His94/His96/His119)
anchor.rationale: de novo scaffold need not reuse CA-II's Zn; H_anchor preserved as evaluation diagnostic, not a fixed motif element (revisions doc R1/R2)

substrate.name: 1-methyl-6,7-dimethoxy-3,4-dihydroisoquinoline (salsolidine precursor)
substrate.pose_source: transferred g-double-dagger (LOW confidence: GPT-5.5 iridicycle Chen/Xiao 2015 vs Claude Noyori-Ikariya Handgraaf/Meijer 2007); placement deferred to a flagged docking step

rfd2_command: rf_diffusion/run_inference.py --config-name=aa inference.deterministic=True inference.ckpt_path=REPO_ROOT/rf_diffusion/model_weights/RFD_173.pt inference.input_pdb=$ARM/3ZP9/motif.pdb inference.ligand=LIG contigmap.contigs=['160'] contigmap.length=160-160 inference.conditions.relative_sasa_v2.active=True inference.conditions.relative_sasa_v2.rasa=0 inference.num_designs=100 inference.design_startnum=0 inference.output_prefix=$SCRATCH/RFdiffusion2/arm_designs/3ZP9/3ZP9_cond0 hydra.job_logging.root.level=WARN
verification: audit/subQB_curation/extractions/3ZP9/deterministic_checks.json -> STRUCTURALLY VALIDATED (18e, CN, CSD bond distributions, motif existence, consistency)
provenance: Monnard/Ward Chem. Sci. 2013 4 3269 (DOI 10.1039/c3sc51065d); reconciled GPT-5.5 + Claude
notes: Generation mode: LIGAND-ONLY buried pocket (contig ['N'] + rasa=0), mirroring RFD2's small_molecule_binder_rasa_buried / heme entries. No fixed protein residues -> no pocket reconstruction; the cofactor core is the rigid ligand.
Cp* ring kept as a rigid steric body; eta5 pi-bonding NOT encoded (RFD2 has no eta5 term).
Labile leg dropped; hydride synthesized (NOT crystallographic) -> active-species core.
Anchor (dative-to-CA-II-Zn) treated as a diagnostic, not a fixed motif element.
Substrate/TS pose deferred: 3ZP9 has no bound substrate and g-double-dagger is transferred (LOW conf).
$ARM = the dir holding compiled/<id>/; set it on the cluster before running the command.
